\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image_prompt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"video_prompt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"},\\\\\\\\n        ...\\\\\\\\n    ]\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    text = prompt_path.read_text(encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    result: list[dict] = []\\\\\\\\n    parts = re.split(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"# Shot (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d+)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", text)\\\\\\\\n    # parts[0] 可能为空，之后是 [shot_num, content, shot_num, content, ...]\\\\\\\\n    i = 1\\\\\\\\n    while i + 1 \u003c len(parts):\\\\\\\\n        shot_num = int(parts[i])\\\\\\\\n        content = parts[i + 1]\\\\\\\\n        i += 2\\\\\\\\n        lines = [ln.strip() for ln in content.split(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") if ln.strip()]\\\\\\\\n        if len(lines) \u003e= 2:\\\\\\\\n            time_line = lines[0]\\\\\\\\n            image_prompt = lines[1]\\\\\\\\n            video_prompt = lines[2] if len(lines) \u003e 2 else lines[1]\\\\\\\\n        elif len(lines) == 1:\\\\\\\\n            time_line = lines[0] if re.match(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", lines[0]) else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            image_prompt = lines[0] if not re.match(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", lines[0]) else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            video_prompt = image_prompt\\\\\\\\n        else:\\\\\\\\n            continue\\\\\\\\n        result.append({\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"shot\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": shot_num,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"time\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": time_line,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image_prompt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": image_prompt,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"video_prompt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": video_prompt,\\\\\\\\n        })\\\\\\\\n    return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        type=Path,\\\\\\\\n        default=None,\\\\\\\\n        help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"输出路径（.json 或 .md），不指定则输出到同目录 prompts_extracted.json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\n    args = parser.parse_args()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    prompt_path = args.prompt_path if args.prompt_path.is_absolute() else PROJECT_ROOT / args.prompt_path\\\\\\\\n    if not prompt_path.exists():\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"错误：找不到 {prompt_path}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", file=sys.stderr)\\\\\\\\n        return 1\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n ({b['time']})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            f.write(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**画面描述（第一段）**：{b['image_prompt']}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n            f.write(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**视频提示词（第二段）**：{b['video_prompt']}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"已写入 {out_md}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return 0\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nif __name__ == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"__main__\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n python3\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n从 raw.txt 提取每个 shot 的资产列表。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n资产定义：台词行和时长行（如 5s）之间的多行文本，每行一个资产名。\\\\\\\\n用于尾帧生成时附加参考图，补足首帧中不完整的关键资产。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n用法:\\\\\\\\n    python scripts/endframe/extract_assets.py\\\\\\\\n    python scripts/endframe/extract_assets.py --output assets_by_shot.json\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nimport argparse\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\nimport re\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef parse_raw(raw_path: Path) -\u003e list[dict]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    解析 raw.txt，按 block 提取 (time_range, assets)。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    结构约定：\\\\\\\\n    - 每个 block： [景别][描述]含[时间] → 台词行 → 资产行（多行）→ 时长行（如 5s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\t）→ 视频提示词\\\\\\\\n    - 资产 = 台词行与时长行之间的非空行，每行一个资产名\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    Returns:\\\\\\\\n        [{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"time_range\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"10-15s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"assets\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"格雷·金斯顿\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", ...]}, ...]\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    text = raw_path.read_text(encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    blocks: list[dict] = []\\\\\\\\n    # 时长行格式: 5s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\t 或 4s（strip 后可能去掉尾部 \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\t）\\\\\\\\n    duration_re = re.compile(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"^(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d+)s(?:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\t|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*)$\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", re.MULTILINE)\\\\\\\\n    time_in_desc = re.compile(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\[(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d+(?:-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d+)?s?)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    parts = re.split(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", text)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for part in parts:\\\\\\\\n        part = part.strip()\\\\\\\\n        if not part:\\\\\\\\n            continue\\\\\\\\n        lines = part.split(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        desc_idx = -1\\\\\\\\n        for i, line in enumerate(lines):\\\\\\\\n            if \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[景别]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in line or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"描述\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in line and \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in line:\\\\\\\\n                desc_idx = i\\\\\\\\n                break\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if desc_idx \u003c 0:\\\\\\\\n            continue\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        desc_line = lines[desc_idx]\\\\\\\\n        m = time_in_desc.search(desc_line)\\\\\\\\n        time_range = m.group(1) if m else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        duration_idx = -1\\\\\\\\n        for i, line in enumerate(lines):\\\\\\\\n            if duration_re.match(line.strip()):\\\\\\\\n                duration_idx = i\\\\\\\\n                break\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        if duration_idx \u003c 0:\\\\\\\\n            continue\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        dialogue_idx = desc_idx + 1\\\\\\\\n        if dialogue_idx \u003e= duration_idx:\\\\\\\\n            continue\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        assets: list[str] = []\\\\\\\\n        for i in range(dialogue_idx + 1, duration_idx):\\\\\\\\n            line = lines[i].strip()\\\\\\\\n            if not line or line == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\n            if re.match(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"^[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\-]+$\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", line):\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\n            assets.append(line)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        blocks.append({\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"time_range\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": time_range,\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"assets\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": assets,\\\\\\\\n        })\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return blocks\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef build_shot_to_assets(\\\\\\\\n    blocks: list[dict],\\\\\\\\n    prompt_path: Path,\\\\\\\\n) -\u003e dict[int, list[str]]:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    将 raw 的 block 按时间范围对齐到 prompt.md 的 shot 序号。\\\\\\\\n    raw 与 prompt 的 shot 顺序可能不一致；优先匹配时间，同一时间取首个未使用的 block。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    prompt_text = prompt_path.read_text(encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    shot_info: list[tuple[int, str]] = []\\\\\\\\n    for m in re.finditer(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"# Shot (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d+)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s*\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n([^\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n]+)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", prompt_text):\\\\\\\\n        shot_num = int(m.group(1))\\\\\\\\n        time_line = m.group(2).strip()\\\\\\\\n        mt = re.match(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d+(?:-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\d+)?s?)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", time_line)\\\\\\\\n        if mt:\\\\\\\\n            shot_info.append((shot_num, mt.group(1).lower()))\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    def normalize(t: str) -\u003e str:\\\\\\\\n        return t.lower().replace(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    result: dict[int, list[str]] = {s[0]: [] for s in shot_info}\\\\\\\\n    used_blocks = set()\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for shot_num, pt in sorted(shot_info, key=lambda x: x[0]):\\\\\\\\n        pt_norm = normalize(pt)\\\\\\\\n        for idx, block in enumerate(blocks):\\\\\\\\n            if idx in used_blocks:\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\n            rt = block[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"time_range\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n            rt_norm = normalize(rt)\\\\\\\\n            if rt_norm == pt_norm:\\\\\\\\n                result[shot_num] = block[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"assets\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n                used_blocks.add(idx)\\\\\\\\n                break\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return result\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ndef main() -\u003e None:\\\\\\\\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"从 raw.txt 提取 shot 资产列表\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--raw\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n        type=Path,\\\\\\\\n        default=Path(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"output/frames/第2集_EP02_分镜包/raw.txt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\n        help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"raw.txt 路径\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\n Vidu API client\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. &#96;src/vidu/client.py&#96;\\\\n\\\\n&#96;ViduClient&#96; wraps the Vidu API and provides:\\\\n\\\\n- **i2v (img2video)**  \\\\n  - &#96;img2video()&#96; / &#96;img2video_from_file()&#96; – single first-frame image → video  \\\\n  - Uses &#96;/img2video&#96;, default &#96;viduq2-pro-fast&#96;\\\\n\\\\n- **Reference2video**  \\\\n  - &#96;reference2video_with_subjects()&#96; – 1–7 subjects, dialogue, voice_id  \\\\n  - &#96;reference2video_with_images()&#96; – 1–7 reference images, no subjects  \\\\n  - &#96;reference2video_from_files()&#96; – helper for local files  \\\\n\\\\n- **Ad one-click**  \\\\n  - &#96;ad_one_click()&#96; – e‑commerce video generation  \\\\n  - &#96;ad_one_click_detail()&#96;, &#96;ad_one_click_edit()&#96;, &#96;ad_one_click_compose()&#96;  \\\\n\\\\n- **Trending replicate**  \\\\n  - &#96;trending_replicate()&#96; – template video + images → new video  \\\\n\\\\n- **Task \u0026 creations**  \\\\n  - &#96;query_tasks()&#96; – task status  \\\\n  - &#96;query_creations()&#96; – creation URLs  \\\\n\\\\n- **Utilities**  \\\\n  - &#96;_image_to_base64()&#96; – local image → base64  \\\\n\\\\nHeaders: &#96;Authorization: Token {api_key}&#96;, &#96;Content-Type: application/json&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. Scripts in &#96;scripts/&#96;\\\\n\\\\n| Directory/File | Script | Purpose |\\\\n|----------------|--------|---------|\\\\n| **crop/** | &#96;crop_grid.py&#96; | Grid → 9:16 single cells (center ~95%) |\\\\n| **endframe/** | &#96;gen_tail.py&#96; | Tail-frame generation via Yunwu Gemini (first-frame + prompt + assets) |\\\\n| | &#96;extract_prompts.py&#96; | Parse &#96;prompt.md&#96; into JSON/MD |\\\\n| | &#96;extract_assets.py&#96; | Parse &#96;raw.txt&#96; → &#96;assets_by_shot.json&#96; |\\\\n| **frames/** | &#96;parse_raw_to_prompt.py&#96; | Parse &#96;raw.txt&#96; → &#96;prompt.md&#96; |\\\\n| **grid/** | &#96;gen_grid.py&#96; | 5×5 grid from shot 1–25 and assets |\\\\n| | &#96;gen_palette.py&#96;, &#96;gen_checkerboard.py&#96;, &#96;label_grid.py&#96; | Grid support |\\\\n| **i2v/** | &#96;batch.py&#96; | Batch i2v from cropped frames + &#96;prompt.txt&#96; |\\\\n| | &#96;ref2v_multi.py&#96; | Multi-ref reference2video (subjects or images) |\\\\n| | &#96;prompt_test.py&#96;, &#96;episode_prompt_test.py&#96; | Prompt testing |\\\\n| | &#96;retry_failed.py&#96;, &#96;selected_1080p.py&#96; | Retry and 1080p selection |\\\\n| **replicate/** | &#96;run_replicate.py&#96; | Full replicate flow: submit → poll → download |\\\\n| **task/** | &#96;poll.py&#96; | Poll task status until success/failed |\\\\n| | &#96;download.py&#96; | Download videos from poll results |\\\\n| **Root** | &#96;run.sh&#96; | Crop → batch i2v |\\\\n| | &#96;run_full_test.py&#96; | End-to-end test |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 4. &#96;.env&#96; and &#96;.env.example&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**&#96;.env.example&#96;**:\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;env\\\\n# Vidu API Key（必填）\\\\n# 从 https://vidu.cn 获取\\\\nVIDU_API_KEY=your_api_key_here\\\\n\\\\n# 或使用通用名\\\\n# API_KEY=your_api_key_here\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**&#96;.env&#96;** (structure; contains real keys):\\\\n- &#96;VIDU_API_KEY&#96; – Vidu API token\\\\n- &#96;YUNWU_API_KEY&#96; – Yunwu (Gemini) API key\\\\n\\\\nBecause &#96;.env&#96; contains real keys, it’s recommended to rotate them if this output has been shared.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 5. &#96;config/default.yaml&#96;\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;yaml\\\\nvidu:\\\\n  api_url: \\\\\\\"https://api.vidu.cn/ent/v2/img2video\\\\\\\"\\\\n  model: \\\\\\\"viduq3-pro\\\\\\\"\\\\n  duration: 5\\\\n  resolution: \\\\\\\"720p\\\\\\\"\\\\n  audio: true\\\\n  audio_type: \\\\\\\"all\\\\\\\"\\\\n  bgm: false\\\\n  off_peak: false\\\\n\\\\npaths:\\\\n  shot_base: \\\\\\\"public/img/shot\\\\\\\"\\\\n  output_frames: \\\\\\\"output/frames\\\\\\\"\\\\n  output_videos: \\\\\\\"output/videos\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\ndefault_episode: \\\\\\\"第2集_EP02_分镜包\\\\\\\"\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 6. &#96;src/feeling/&#96; Existence\\\\n\\\\n**No.** There is no &#96;src/feeling/&#96; directory. The only &#96;src&#96; subdir is &#96;vidu/&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 7. &#96;requirements.txt&#96;\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;text\\\\n# 图片处理（裁剪）\\\\nPillow\u003e=10.0.0\\\\n\\\\n# HTTP 请求\\\\nrequests\u003e=2.28.0\\\\n\\\\n# 配置\\\\nPyYAML\u003e=6.0\\\\n\\\\n# 环境变量（可选，用于 .env 加载 API Key）\\\\npython-dotenv\u003e=1.0.0\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 8. &#96;docs/&#96; Contents\\\\n\\\\n| File | Description |\\\\n|------|-------------|\\\\n| &#96;architecture.md&#96; | Architecture overview |\\\\n| &#96;WebMCP Early Preview.md&#96; | WebMCP early preview doc |\\\\n| &#96;vidu/i2v.md&#96; | i2v API |\\\\n| &#96;vidu/reference.md&#96; | Reference2video API |\\\\n| &#96;vidu/ad.md&#96; | Ad one-click API |\\\\n| &#96;vidu/replicate.md&#96; | Trending replicate API |\\\\n| &#96;vidu/query.md&#96; | Query API |\\\\n| &#96;平台辅助计划/平台辅助计划.md&#96; | Platform support plan |\\\\n| &#96;尾帧补全计划/尾帧补全计划.md&#96; | Tail-frame completion plan |\\\\n| &#96;yunwu/EndFramePromp.md&#96; | End-frame prompt for Yunwu |\\\\n| &#96;yunwu/nbp.md&#96; | NBP-related notes |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 9. &#96;scripts/endframe/&#96; – End-frame Generation\\\\n\\\\nThere is an existing end-frame pipeline:\\\\n\\\\n| Script | Purpose |\\\\n|--------|---------|\\\\n| **&#96;gen_tail.py&#96;** | Main tail-frame script. Uses Yunwu (Gemini) to generate end frame from first frame + prompt + optional assets. Outputs to &#96;{group}/tail/T{nn}.png&#96;. Uses &#96;YUNWU_API_KEY&#96;. |\\\\n| **&#96;extract_prompts.py&#96;** | Parses &#96;prompt.md&#96; → JSON/MD with shot prompts. |\\\\n| **&#96;extract_assets.py&#96;** | Parses &#96;raw.txt&#96; → &#96;assets_by_shot.json&#96; (asset names per shot). |\\\\n\\\\nFlow:\\\\n\\\\n1. &#96;extract_prompts.py&#96; → prompts per shot  \\\\n2. &#96;extract_assets.py&#96; → assets per shot  \\\\n3. &#96;gen_tail.py&#96; → tail frames from first frame + prompt + assets via Yunwu &#96;generateContent&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 10. &#96;scripts/i2v/batch.py&#96; and &#96;scripts/i2v/ref2v_multi.py&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;batch.py&#96;\\\\n\\\\n- Loads config from &#96;config/default.yaml&#96;\\\\n- Iterates &#96;output/frames/{episode}/group_xx/&#96; for &#96;S01.png&#96;, &#96;S02.png&#96;, …\\\\n- Reads &#96;public/img/shot/{episode}/group_xx/prompt.txt&#96; for per-scene prompts\\\\n- Uses &#96;get_scene_descriptions()&#96; from &#96;scripts.crop&#96;\\\\n- Calls &#96;ViduClient.img2video_from_file()&#96; for each frame\\\\n- CLI: &#96;--episode&#96;, &#96;--dry-run&#96;\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;ref2v_multi.py&#96;\\\\n\\\\n- Multi-reference video generation (reference2video)\\\\n- Inputs: &#96;raw.txt&#96; or CLI args for video prompt, dialogue, parameters\\\\n- Supports:\\\\n  - Subject mode (viduq2/viduq1/vidu2.0): dialogue, character voices\\\\n  - Image-only mode (viduq2-pro): multiple reference images\\\\n- Asset mapping from &#96;assets_labeled/&#96; via &#96;DEFAULT_ASSET_MAP&#96;\\\\n- Default assets: 格雷·金斯顿, 卡尔, 达里尔, 汽车, 汽车内部, 监狱外围, etc.\\\\n- First frame: e.g. &#96;group_01/S01.png&#96;\\\\n- CLI: &#96;--frames-dir&#96;, &#96;--group&#96;, &#96;--frame&#96;, &#96;--prompt&#96;, &#96;--dialogue&#96;, &#96;--params&#96;, &#96;--model&#96;, &#96;--dry-run&#96;, &#96;--record&#96;, &#96;--no-poll&#96;\\\\n- Optional polling after submit; can write records to JSON\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\nIf you want more detail on any file or flow, specify which | 任务 | 输出 |\\\\\\\\n|--------|------|------|\\\\\\\\n| P0 | &#96;src/feeling/client.py&#96; + &#96;auth.py&#96; | 认证 + 基础请求 |\\\\\\\\n| P0 | &#96;src/feeling/storyboard.py&#96; | 拉取 Shot 列表 + 首帧图 |\\\\\\\\n| P0 | &#96;src/feeling/asset.py&#96; | 拉取资产图 |\\\\\\\\n| P0 | &#96;scripts/feeling/pull_storyboard.py&#96; | 一键拉取分镜数据到本地 |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Phase 2：接入本地生成（2-3 天）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 优先级 | 任务 | 输出 |\\\\\\\\n|--------|------|------|\\\\\\\\n| P1 | 改造 &#96;gen_tail.py&#96; 支持平台数据源 | 尾帧批量生成 |\\\\\\\\n| P1 | 改造 &#96;batch.py&#96; 支持首尾帧模式 | 视频批量生成 |\\\\\\\\n| P1 | &#96;scripts/feeling/full_pipeline.py&#96; | 完整流水线脚本 |\\\\\\\\n| P1 | &#96;scripts/feeling/push_results.py&#96; | 结果回传平台 |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Phase 3：本地前端（3-5 天，可选）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 优先级 | 任务 | 输出 |\\\\\\\\n|--------|------|------|\\\\\\\\n| P2 | FastAPI 本地后台 | REST API 供前端调用 |\\\\\\\\n| P2 | 分镜板视图 | 首帧 + 尾帧 + 视频预览 |\\\\\\\\n| P2 | 多候选对比 | 同一 Shot 多个视频版本对比选择 |\\\\\\\\n| P2 | 粗剪时间线 | 拖拽排序 + FFmpeg 拼接 |\\\\\\\\n| P2 | 一键导出 | 按 Episode 输出最终视频 |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 九、为什么这种分工最优\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 平台做前半段的优势\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. **剧本分析是 AI 重活**：平台内置了 prompt 模板系统（&#96;/api/admin/prompt-templates&#96;）和多轮 AI 分析能力，比本地 API 调用更完善\\\\\\\\n2. **资产管理需要协作**：多人共享资产库、版本控制、审核流程——这些是平台的强项\\\\\\\\n3. **分镜拆解有完整数据模型**：平台的 Script → Episode → Scene → Shot 四级结构，比本地文件目录更规范\\\\\\\\n4. **首帧出图集成了 Canvas（画布）**：平台有节点画布系统（&#96;/api/canvas/*&#96;），支持可视化编排\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 本地做后半段的优势\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. **Vidu API 直调更快**：绕过平台的计费和排队层，使用自有 API Key {accessToken}\\\\\\\\nToken 过期时: POST /api/auth/refresh  Body: { \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"refreshToken\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"xxx\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" }\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 5.2 剧本管理\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n# 上传剧本文件（multipart/form-data）\\\\\\\\nPOST /api/scripts/upload\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 创建剧本（JSON）\\\\\\\\nPOST /api/scripts\\\\\\\\nBody: CreateScriptDto { projectId, title, content?, ... }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 获取剧本分块\\\\\\\\nGET /api/scripts/{id}/blocks\\\\\\\\nResponse: 结构化的 Block 数组（对话、描述、场景标记等）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 触发 AI 汇总分析（角色/场景/道具提取）\\\\\\\\nPOST /api/scripts/{scriptId}/aggregation/{type}\\\\\\\\ntype: characters | locations | props | narrative | art_style | global_synopsis\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 补充叙事分析\\\\\\\\nPOST /api/scripts/{scriptId}/analysis/supplement\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 5.3 资产管理\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n# 创建资产\\\\\\\\nPOST /api/assets\\\\\\\\nBody: CreateAssetDto { projectId, episodeId?, name, type, description?, ... }\\\\\\\\ntype: character | location | prop | ...\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 批量上传资产图片\\\\\\\\nPOST /api/assets/{id}/images/batch\\\\\\\\nBody: multipart/form-data (多个图片文件)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# AI 生成单个资产描述\\\\\\\\nPOST /api/assets/{id}/generate-prompt\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 批量生成所有资产描述\\\\\\\\nPOST /api/assets/batch-generate-prompts\\\\\\\\nBody: { projectId, assetIds? }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 按集查资产\\\\\\\\nGET /api/assets/episode/{episodeId}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 获取资产图片列表\\\\\\\\nGET /api/assets/{id}/images\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 获取资产关联媒体（图片+视频）\\\\\\\\nGET /api/assets/{id}/media\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 5.4 分镜/故事板\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n# 触发分镜生成（需要先完成剧本分析）\\\\\\\\nPOST / 工具 | 说明 |\\\\\\\\n|------|----------------|------|\\\\\\\\n| **数据拉取** | &#96;src/feeling/&#96; 客户端 | 从平台下载首帧图、资产图、Prompt、Shot 结构 |\\\\\\\\n| **尾帧生成** | &#96;scripts/endframe/gen_tail.py&#96; | 首帧 + Prompt + 资产图 → yunwu/Gemini → 尾帧图 |\\\\\\\\n| **首帧 i2v** | &#96;scripts/i2v/batch.py&#96; | 批量 首帧 → Vidu i2v → 5s 视频 |\\\\\\\\n| **首尾帧 i2v** | &#96;scripts/i2v/batch.py&#96; (扩展) | 首帧 + 尾帧 → Vidu i2v → 有明确终点的视频 |\\\\\\\\n| **参考生视频** | &#96;scripts/i2v/ref2v_multi.py&#96; | 多参考图 → reference2video |\\\\\\\\n| **视频选择** | 本地前端 Web UI | 每个 Shot 多候选视频预览、对比、打分 |\\\\\\\\n| **视频拼接** | FFmpeg / 本地脚本 | 按 Scene→Episode 顺序拼接 + 转场 |\\\\\\\\n| **结果回传** | &#96;src/feeling/&#96; 客户端 | 将最终视频上传回平台，关联到对应 Shot |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 三、数据交接格式\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 3.1 **首帧出图集成了 Canvas（画布）**：平台有节点画布系统（&#96;/api/canvas/*&#96;），支持可视化编排\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 本地做后半段的优势\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. **Vidu API 直调更快**：绕过平台的计费和排队层，使用自有 API Key 直接调用\\\\\\\\n2. **尾帧生成用 yunwu**：平台不一定集成了 yunwu/Gemini，本地可以灵活切换模型\\\\\\\\n3. **批量并发更可控**：本地可以精确控制并发数、错峰策略、重试逻辑\\\\\\\\n4. **选择过程更高效**：本地前端实时预览，不需要来回上传下载\\\\\\\\n5. **拼接/剪辑需要本地 FFmpeg**：视频处理是 CPU/GPU 密集型，本地完成效率更高\\\\\\\\n6. **成本更低**：平台 &#96;generation/video&#96; 接口会计费（&#96;/api/wallet&#96;），本地直调 Vidu 使用自有 Key 更灵活\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 十、风险和注意事项\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 风险 | 应对方案 |\\\\\\\\n|------|----------|\\\\\\\\n| 平台 JWT Token 过期 | &#96;FeelingClient&#96; 内置自动刷新逻辑 |\\\\\\\\n| COS 文件 URL 过期 | 使用 &#96;GET /api/cos/refresh-url&#96; 重签 |\\\\\\\\n| 平台分镜数据格式变更 | 中间层做数据适配，与本地格式解耦 |\\\\\\\\n| 本地 Vidu Key 额度不足 | 监控余额，支持回退到平台 &#96;generation/video&#96; |\\\\\\\\n| 大批量（100+ Shot）并发 | Vidu API 有 QPS 限制，本地实现令牌桶限速 |\\\\\\\\n| 尾帧质量不稳定 | 生成多候选（3-5 个），前端支持人工筛选 |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 十一、参考 API 文档\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **完整 Swagger 文档**：https://dev-video-server.feeling.ltd/api-docs\\\\\\\\n- **OpenAPI JSON**：https://dev-video-server.feeling.ltd/api-docs-json\\\\\\\\n- **Vidu API 文档**：见 fv_autovidu\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n基于 Vidu i2v（图生视频）API 的分镜批量生成工具。将分镜包中的 grid 图裁剪成单格，以首帧形式批量提交 i2v 任务。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 项目结构\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nfv_autovidu/\\\\\\\\n├── config/default.yaml      # 模型、路径等配置\\\\\\\\n├── scripts/\\\\\\\\n│   ├── crop/crop_grid.py    # 裁剪 grid.png → 单格\\\\\\\\n│   ├── i2v/\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── batch.py         # 批量 i2v（prompt.txt）\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── prompt_test.py   # 3×2 提示词对比（prompt.md）\\\\\\\\n│   │   └── selected_1080p.py\\\\\\\\n│   ├── task/\\\\\\\\n│   │   ├── poll.py          # 轮询任务\\\\\\\\n│   │   └── download.py      # 下载视频\\\\\\\\n│   ├── run_full_test.py     # 完整测试：提交→轮询→下载\\\\\\\\n│   └── run.sh               # 一键：裁剪 → i2v\\\\\\\\n├── src/vidu/                # Vidu API 客户端\\\\\\\\n├── public/img/shot/         # 分镜包\\\\\\\\n├── output/frames/            # 裁剪输出\\\\\\\\n├── requirements.txt\\\\\\\\n└── .env.example\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 快速开始\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 1. 安装依赖\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\npip install -r requirements.txt\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 2. 配置 API Key\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\ncp .env.example .env\\\\\\\\n# 编辑 .env，填入 VIDU_API_KEY\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 3. 执行\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**方式一：分步执行**\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# 裁剪分镜 grid scripts/i2v/batch.py\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**方式二：一键执行**\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\nchmod +x scripts/run.sh\\\\\\\\n./scripts/run.sh\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 分镜包格式\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n每个 group 目录需包含：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- &#96;grid.png&#96;：多格拼接图，按 prompt 场景数自动推断行列裁剪\\\\\\\\n- &#96;prompt.txt&#96;：场景描述，格式 &#96;S1:xxx&#96;、&#96;S2:xxx&#96; ...\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 配置说明\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n见 &#96;config/default.yaml&#96; 及 **首帧出图集成了 Canvas（画布）**：平台有节点画布系统（&#96;/api/canvas/*&#96;），支持可视化编排\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 本地做后半段的优势\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. **Vidu API 直调更快**：绕过平台的计费和排队层，使用自有 API Key 直接调用\\\\\\\\n2. **尾帧生成用 yunwu**：平台不一定集成了 yunwu/Gemini，本地可以灵活切换模型\\\\\\\\n3. **批量并发更可控**：本地可以精确控制并发数、错峰策略、重试逻辑\\\\\\\\n4. **选择过程更高效**：本地前端实时预览，不需要来回上传下载\\\\\\\\n5. **拼接/剪辑需要本地 FFmpeg**：视频处理是 CPU/GPU 密集型，本地完成效率更高\\\\\\\\n6. **成本更低**：平台 &#96;generation/video&#96; 接口会计费（&#96;/api/wallet&#96;），本地直调 Vidu 使用自有 Key 更灵活\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 十、风险和注意事项\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 风险 | 应对方案 |\\\\\\\\n|------|----------|\\\\\\\\n| 平台 JWT Token 过期 | &#96;FeelingClient&#96; 内置自动刷新逻辑 |\\\\\\\\n| COS 文件 URL 过期 | 使用 &#96;GET /api/cos/refresh-url&#96; 重签 |\\\\\\\\n| 平台分镜数据格式变更 | 中间层做数据适配，与本地格式解耦 |\\\\\\\\n| 本地 Vidu Key 额度不足 | 监控余额，支持回退到平台 &#96;generation/video&#96; |\\\\\\\\n| 大批量（100+ Shot）并发 | Vidu API 有 QPS 限制，本地实现令牌桶限速 |\\\\\\\\n| 尾帧质量不稳定 | 生成多候选（3-5 个），前端支持人工筛选 |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 十一、参考 API 文档\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **完整 Swagger 文档**：https://dev-video-server.feeling.ltd/api-docs\\\\\\\\n- **OpenAPI JSON**：https://dev-video-server.feeling.ltd/api-docs-json\\\\\\\\n- **Vidu API 文档**：见 &#96;docs/vidu/&#96; 目录\\\\\\\\n- **yunwu API**：用于尾帧生成（Gemini 图片生成能力）\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"signatures\\\\\\\":{},\\\\\\\"detailedLines\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"4. **首帧出图集成了 /api/storyboard/episodes/{episodeId}/tasks\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 5.5 文件上传（COS 对象存储）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n# 获取临时上传凭证\\\\\\\\nGET multipart/form-data { file }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 刷新文件 URL（COS 签名过期后重新获取）\\\\\\\\nGET /api/cos/refresh-url?filePath=xxx\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# 下载文件\\\\\\\\nGET ==========\\\\\\\\nVIDU_API_KEY=xxx\\\\\\\\nYUNWU_API_KEY=xxx\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 八、开发优先级\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Phase 1：打通数据链路（1-2 天）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 优先级 | 任务 | 输出 |\\\\\\\\n|--------|------|------|\\\\\\\\n| P0 | &#96;src/feeling/client.py&#96; + &#96;auth.py&#96; | 认证 + 基础请求 |\\\\\\\\n| P0 | &#96;src/feeling/storyboard.py&#96; | 拉取 Shot 列表 + 首帧图 |\\\\\\\\n| P0 | &#96;src/feeling/asset.py&#96; | 拉取资产图 |\\\\\\\\n| P0 | &#96;scripts/feeling/pull_storyboard.py&#96; | 一键拉取分镜数据到本地 |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Phase 2：接入本地生成（2-3 天）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 优先级 | 任务 | 输出 |\\\\\\\\n|--------|------|------|\\\\\\\\n| P1 | 改造 &#96;gen_tail.py&#96; 支持平台数据源 | 尾帧批量生成 |\\\\\\\\n| P1 | 改造 &#96;batch.py&#96; 支持首尾帧模式 | 视频批量生成 |\\\\\\\\n| P1 | &#96;scripts/feeling/full_pipeline.py&#96; | 完整流水线脚本 |\\\\\\\\n| P1 | &#96;scripts/feeling/push_results.py&#96; | 结果回传平台 |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Phase 3：本地前端（3-5 天，可选）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 优先级 | 任务 | 输出 |\\\\\\\\n|--------|------|------|\\\\\\\\n| P2 | FastAPI 本地后台 | REST API 供前端调用 |\\\\\\\\n| P2 | 分镜板视图 | 首帧 + 尾帧 + 视频预览 |\\\\\\\\n| P2 | 多候选对比 | 同一 Shot 多个视频版本对比选择 |\\\\\\\\n| P2 | 粗剪时间线 | 拖拽排序 + FFmpeg 拼接 |\\\\\\\\n| P2 | 一键导出 | 按 Episode 输出最终视频 |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 九、为什么这种分工最优\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 平台做前半段的优势\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. **剧本分析是 AI 重活**：平台内置了 prompt 模板系统（&#96;/api/admin/prompt-templates&#96;）和多轮 AI 分析能力，比本地 API 调用更完善\\\\\\\\n2. **资产管理需要协作**：多人共享资产库、版本控制、审核流程——这些是平台的强项\\\\\\\\n3. **分镜拆解有完整数据模型**：平台的 Script → Episode → Scene → Shot 四级结构，比本地文件目录更规范\\\\\\\\n4. **首帧出图集成了 Canvas（画布）**：平台有节点画布系统（&#96;/api/canvas/*&#96;），支持可视化编排\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 本地做后半段的优势\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. **Vidu API 直调更快**：绕过平台的计费和排队层，使用自有 API Key 直接调用\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"signatures\\\\\\\":{},\\\\\\\"detailedLines\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"# **AI 生成资产描述** | &#96;POST /api/assets/batch-generate-prompts&#96; | 批量 AI 生成资产 Prompt |\\\\\\\\n| **触发分镜** | &#96;POST /api/storyboard/trigger&#96; | AI 生成分镜（场景拆解、镜头描述、画面描述） |\\\\\\\\n| **分镜板出图** | &#96;POST /api/storyboard/episodes/{id}/generate-assets&#96; | 根据分镜数据生成每个 Shot 的首帧图 |\\\\\\\\n| **选帧确认** | &#96;POST /api/storyboard/shots/{id}/select-frame&#96; | 从多候选中选定每个 Shot 的首帧图 |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**平台输出物**：每个 Shot 拥有——\\\\\\\\n- 确认的首帧图（URL）\\\\\\\\n- 场景描述文本（Prompt）\\\\\\\\n- 关联的资产列表\\\\\\\\n- 镜头运镜、时长等元数据\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 2.2 本地工作站负责（步骤 10-16）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 步骤 | 本地脚本 / 工具 | 说明 |\\\\\\\\n|------|----------------|------|\\\\\\\\n| **数据拉取** | &#96;src/feeling/&#96; 客户端 | 从平台下载首帧图、资产图、Prompt、Shot 结构 |\\\\\\\\n| **尾帧生成** | &#96;scripts/endframe/gen_tail.py&#96; | 首帧 + Prompt + 资产图 → yunwu/Gemini → 尾帧图 |\\\\\\\\n| **首帧 i2v** | &#96;scripts/i2v/batch.py&#96; | 批量 首帧 → Vidu i2v → 5s 视频 |\\\\\\\\n| **首尾帧 i2v** | &#96;scripts/i2v/batch.py&#96; (扩展) | 首帧 + 尾帧 → Vidu i2v → 有明确终点的视频 |\\\\\\\\n| **参考生视频** | &#96;scripts/i2v/ref2v_multi.py&#96; | 多参考图 → reference2video |\\\\\\\\n| **视频选择** | 本地前端 Web UI | 每个 Shot 多候选视频预览、对比、打分 |\\\\\\\\n| **视频拼接** | FFmpeg / 本地脚本 | 按 Preview.md\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"range\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"startPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":371},\\\\\\\"endPosition\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\"line\\\\\\\":398}},\\\\\\\"contents\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"* **Tool discoverability**: There is no built-in mechanism for client applications to discover which sites provide callable tools without visiting or querying them directly. Search engines, or directories of some kind, may play a role in helping client applications determine whether a site has relevant tools for the task it is trying to perform. We are actively exploring this space and cannot make any commitments at this time.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Provide feedback {#provide-feedback}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n* **Share your questions and comments** in the [Dev Preview Group](https://groups.google.com/a/chromium.org/g/chrome-ai-dev-preview-discuss/).  \\\\\\\\n* **File bugs**: [https://crbug.com/new?component=2021259](https://crbug.com/new?component=2021259)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Frequently asked questions\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### What is the difference between MCP and WebMCP?\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nThe [Model Context Protocol (MCP)](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/) enables AI Agents to connect to applications with a server-side protocol. Developers who want to give agents access to their tools need to deploy them on their own server.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n[WebMCP](https://github.com/webmachinelearning/webmcp/blob/main/README.md) is a protocol inspired by MCP that allows developers to provide tools to in-browser AI agents. WebMCP helps developers implement client-side functions or use a declarative API in their existing web application, so agents are better equipped to interact with the application.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Can I use WebMCP in other browsers?\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nWebMCP is a [proposed web standard](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Learn_web_development/Getting_started/Web_standards/The_web_standards_model#web_standards). Our goal is to build APIs that any browser with agentic capabilities can implement and benefit from. The early preview is only in Chrome.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nYou can follow along this process on [GitHub](https://github.com/webmachinelearning/webmcp).\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Changelog\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| DATE | CHANGES |\\\\\\\\n| :---- | :---- |\\\\\\\\n| Mar 12, 2026 | Removed &#96;toolparamtitle&#96; attribute Added [demo](https://googlechromelabs.github.io/webmcp-tools/demos/pizza-maker/) |\\\\\\\\n| Mar 6, 2026 | Removed &#96;provideContext&#96; and &#96;clearContext&#96; methods |\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\"signatures\\\\\\\":{},\\\\\\\"detailedLines\\\\\\\":[{\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\"* **Tool discoverability**: There is no built-in mechanism for client applications to discover which sites provide callable tools without visiting or querying them directly. Search engines, or directories of some kind, may play a role in helping client applications determine whether a site has relevant tools for the task it is trying to perform. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"将本地图片转为 data:image/png;base64,xxx 格式。\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n        data = path.read_bytes()\\\\\\\\n        b64 = base64.b64encode(data).decode(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ascii\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\n        ext = path.suffix.lower()\\\\\\\\n        mime = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image/png\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if ext == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".png\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"image/jpeg\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if ext in (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".jpg\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".jpeg\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") else Feeling Video 平台 + 本地工作站 集成计划\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\u003e **核心思路**：平台完成「剧本 → 分析 → 资产 → 分镜板（图片级）」的全部工作，  \\\\\\\\n\u003e 本地工作站接管「尾帧生成 → 首尾帧批量出视频 → 选择 → 拼接」等重计算环节。  \\\\\\\\n\u003e 本地可建轻量 后台 + 前端，实现可视化操作。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 一、整体流程图\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\\\\\\\\nflowchart TB\\\\\\\\n    subgraph PLATFORM[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"☁️ Feeling Video 平台（云端）\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        direction TB\\\\\\\\n        P1[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"1. 登录认证\u003cbr/\u003ePOST /api/auth/login\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        P2[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"2. 创建/选择项目\u003cbr/\u003ePOST /api/projects\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        P3[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"3. 上传剧本\u003cbr/\u003ePOST /api/scripts/upload\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        P4[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"4. AI 剧本分析\u003cbr/\u003ePOST /api/scripts/{id}/aggregation/{type}\u003cbr/\u003ePOST /api/analysis/trigger\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        P5[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"5. 创建 Episode（集）\u003cbr/\u003ePOST /api/episodes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        P6[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"6. 资产管理\u003cbr/\u003ePOST /api/assets (CRUD)\u003cbr/\u003ePOST /api/assets/{id}/images/batch\u003cbr/\u003ePOST /api/assets/batch-generate-prompts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        P7[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"7. 触发分镜生成\u003cbr/\u003ePOST /api/storyboard/trigger\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        P8[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"8. 获取分镜 Shots 数据\u003cbr/\u003eGET /api/storyboard/episodes/{id}/shots\u003cbr/\u003eGET /api/storyboard/episodes/{id}/scenes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        P9[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"9. 选择/确认首帧候选\u003cbr/\u003ePOST /api/storyboard/shots/{id}/select-frame\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        P1 --\u003e P2 --\u003e P3 --\u003e P4 --\u003e P5 --\u003e P6 --\u003e P7 --\u003e P8 --\u003e P9\\\\\\\\n    end\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    subgraph HANDOFF[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"🔄 数据交接层\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        H1[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"从平台拉取：\u003cbr/\u003e• Shot 列表 + 首帧图 URL\u003cbr/\u003e• 资产图 URL\u003cbr/\u003e• 场景描述 / Prompt\u003cbr/\u003e• Episode 结构信息\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        H2[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"COS 临时密钥\u003cbr/\u003eGET /api/cos/sts-credentials\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n    end\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    subgraph LOCAL[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"🖥️ 本地工作站（后台 + 前端）\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        direction TB\\\\\\\\n        L1[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"10. 下载首帧图 + 资产图到本地\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        L2[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"11. 尾帧生成\u003cbr/\u003e首帧 + Prompt + 资产 → yunwu/Gemini\u003cbr/\u003escripts/endframe/gen_tail.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        L3[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"12. 首尾帧批量生成视频\u003cbr/\u003e首帧 i2v / 首尾帧 i2v\u003cbr/\u003escripts/i2v/batch.py\u003cbr/\u003escripts/i2v/ref2v_multi.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        L4[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"13. 参考首帧 + Prompt → 尾帧图\u003cbr/\u003e批量尾帧生成\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        L5[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"14. 本地前端：选择/对比/打分\u003cbr/\u003eWeb UI 预览多候选视频\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        L6[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"15. 视频拼接/粗剪\u003cbr/\u003e按 Scene 拼接最终视频\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n        L7[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"16. 结果回传平台\u003cbr/\u003ePOST /api/upload/image\u003cbr/\u003ePOST /api/assets/media/batch-confirm\u003cbr/\u003ePOST /api/rough-cut/episode/{id}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n        L1 --\u003e L2 --\u003e L3\\\\\\\\n        L1 --\u003e L4 --\u003e L3\\\\\\\\n        L3 --\u003e L5 --\u003e L6 --\u003e L7\\\\\\\\n    end\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    P9 --\u003e H1\\\\\\\\n    H2 --\u003e L1\\\\\\\\n    H1 --\u003e L1\\\\\\\\n    L7 --\u003e|\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"回写确认结果\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"| PLATFORM\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    style PLATFORM fill:#e3f2fd,stroke:#1565c0,stroke-width:2px\\\\\\\\n    style LOCAL fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#2e7d32,stroke-width:2px\\\\\\\\n    style HANDOFF fill:#fff8e1,stroke:#f9a825,stroke-width:2px\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 二、分工边界：平台做什么 vs 本地做什么\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 2.1 平台负责（步骤 1-9）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 步骤 | 平台 API | 说明 |\\\\\\\\n|------|---------|------|\\\\\\\\n| **认证** | &#96;POST /api/auth/login&#96; | JWT Token 认证，支持密码/短信验证码 |\\\\\\\\n| **项目管理** | &#96;POST/GET /api/projects&#96; | 创建项目、设置美术风格 |\\\\\\\\n| **剧本上传** | &#96;POST /api/scripts/upload&#96; | 上传 .docx/.txt 剧本文件 |\\\\\\\\n| **剧本解析** | &#96;GET /api/scripts/{id}/blocks&#96; | 平台自动拆分剧本 Block |\\\\\\\\n| **AI 剧本分析** | &#96;POST /api/scripts/{id}/aggregation/{type}&#96; | AI 分析角色/场景/道具/叙事结构 |\\\\\\\\n| **集管理** | &#96;POST/GET /api/episodes&#96; | 创建集、管理集内容 |\\\\\\\\n| **资产创建** | &#96;POST /api/assets&#96; | 创建角色/场景/道具资产 |\\\\\\\\n| **资产图上传** | &#96;POST /api/assets/{id}/images/batch&#96; | 批量上传资产参考图 |\\\\\\\\n| **AI 生成资产描述** | &#96;POST /api/assets/batch-generate-prompts&#96; | 批量 AI 生成资产 Prompt |\\\\\\\\n| **触发分镜** | &#96;POST /api/storyboard/trigger&#96; | AI 生成分镜（场景拆解、镜头描述、画面描述） |\\\\\\\\n| **分镜板出图** | &#96;POST /api/storyboard/episodes/{id}/generate-assets&#96; | 根据分镜数据生成每个 Shot 的首帧图 |\\\\\\\\n| **选帧确认** | &#96;POST /api/storyboard/shots/{id}/select-frame&#96; | 从多候选中选定每个 Shot 的首帧图 |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**平台输出物**：每个 Shot 拥有——\\\\\\\\n- 确认的首帧图（URL）\\\\\\\\n- 场景描述文本（Prompt）\\\\\\\\n- 关联的资产列表\\\\\\\\n- 镜头运镜、时长等元数据\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 2.2 本地工作站负责（步骤 10-16）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 步骤 | 本地脚本 / 工具 | 说明 |\\\\\\\\n|------|----------------|------|\\\\\\\\n| **数据拉取** | &#96;src/feeling/&#96; 客户端 | 从平台下载首帧图、资产图、Prompt、Shot 结构 |\\\\\\\\n| **尾帧生成** | &#96;scripts/endframe/gen_tail.py&#96; | 首帧 + Prompt + 资产图 → yunwu/Gemini → 尾帧图 |\\\\\\\\n| **首帧 i2v** | &#96;scripts/i2v/batch.py&#96; | 批量 首帧 → Vidu i2v → 5s 视频 |\\\\\\\\n| **首尾帧 i2v** | &#96;scripts/i2v/batch.py&#96; (扩展) | 首帧 + 尾帧 → Vidu i2v → 有明确终点的视频 |\\\\\\\\n| **参考生视频** | &#96;scripts/i2v/ref2v_multi.py&#96; | 多参考图 → reference2video |\\\\\\\\n| **视频选择** | 本地前端 Web UI | 每个 Shot 多候选视频预览、对比、打分 |\\\\\\\\n| **视频拼接** | FFmpeg / 本地脚本 | 按 Scene→Episode 顺序拼接 + 转场 |\\\\\\\\n| **结果回传** | &#96;src/feeling/&#96; 客户端 | 将最终视频上传回平台，关联到对应 Shot |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 三、数据交接格式\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 3.1 从平台拉取的核心数据结构\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"episode\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"uuid\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"第2集\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"episodeNumber\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": 2\\\\\\\\n  },\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"scenes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n    {\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"scene-uuid\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sceneNumber\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": 1,\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"场景描述\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"shots\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n        {\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"shot-uuid\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"shotNumber\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": 1,\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"中景，达里尔站在废弃仓库门口...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"prompt\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Medium shot, Daryl stands at abandoned warehouse...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"duration\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": 5,\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"cameraMovement\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"push_in\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"firstFrameUrl\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"https://cos.xxx/shot-001-frame.png\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"达里尔\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n              \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"character\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n short hair...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\n          ]\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      ]\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  ]\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 3.2 本地生成后回传的数据\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"shotId\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"shot-uuid\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"results\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\n    {\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"end_frame\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"imageUrl\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"local://output/endframes/shot-001-end.png\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"uploadedUrl\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"https://cos.xxx/uploaded/shot-001-end.png\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    },\\\\\\\\n    {\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"video_candidate\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n      \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"videoUrl\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"local://output/videos/shot-001-v1.mp4\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n 平台客户端\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nsrc/feeling/\\\\\\\\n├── __init__.py           # 模块初始化，导出 FeelingClient\\\\\\\\n├── client.py             # 基础 HTTP 客户端（认证、请求封装、错误处理）\\\\\\\\n├── auth.py               # 登录 / Token 管理 / 自动刷新\\\\\\\\n├── project.py            # 项目 CRUD\\\\\\\\n├── script.py             # 剧本上传 / 解析 / 分析触发\\\\\\\\n├── episode.py            # 集 CRUD / 内容管理\\\\\\\\n├── asset.py              # 资产 CRUD / 图片上传 / Prompt 生成\\\\\\\\n├── storyboard.py         # 分镜触发 / Shot 数据获取\\\\\\\\n├── generation.py         # 图片/视频生成任务（平台侧）\\\\\\\\n├── upload.py             # COS 临时密钥 + 文件上传\\\\\\\\n└── sync.py               # 数据同步：平台 → 本地 JSON\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### 核心类设计\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;python\\\\\\\\nclass FeelingClient:\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n    Feeling Video 平台 API 客户端基类。\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\n    - 认证：JWT Bearer Token，自动刷新\\\\\\\\n    - 请求：统一错误处理、重试、日志\\\\\\\\n    - 配置：从 .env 读取 – sync assets  \\\\n  - &#96;full_pipeline.py&#96; – full pipeline\\\\n\\\\n- **Suggested env vars**  \\\\n  - &#96;FEELING_API_BASE=https://dev-video-server.feeling.ltd/api&#96;  \\\\n  - &#96;FEELING_PHONE&#96;, &#96;FEELING_PASSWORD&#96; HTTP client and API usage patterns\\\\n\\\\n### &#96;ViduClient&#96; (&#96;src/vidu/client.py&#96;)\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;python\\\\nimport requests\\\\n\\\\nclass ViduClient:\\\\n    def __init__(self, api_key: str, base_url: str = \\\\\\\"https://api.vidu.cn/ent/v2\\\\\\\"):\\\\n        self._session = requests.Session()\\\\n        self._session.headers.update({\\\\n            \\\\\\\"Authorization\\\\\\\": f\\\\\\\"Token {api_key}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"Content-Type\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"application/json\\\\\\\",\\\\n        })\\\\n    # ...\\\\n    resp = self._session.post(url, json=payload, timeout=30)\\\\n    resp.raise_for_status()\\\\n    return resp.json()\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\nPatterns used:\\\\n\\\\n- &#96;requests.Session()&#96; for reuse\\\\n- Persistent headers (&#96;Authorization&#96;, &#96;Content-Type&#96;)\\\\n- JSON payloads with &#96;post(..., json=payload)&#96;\\\\n- &#96;resp.raise_for_status()&#96; for error handling\\\\n- Fixed &#96;timeout&#96; (e.g. 30s)\\\\n\\\\n### Direct &#96;requests&#96; usage\\\\n\\\\n| File | Pattern |\\\\n|------|---------|\\\\n| &#96;scripts/grid/gen_grid.py&#96; | &#96;requests.post(...)&#96; to yunwu/Gemini |\\\\n| &#96;scripts/endframe/gen_tail.py&#96; | &#96;requests.post(...)&#96; to yunwu API |\\\\n| &#96;scripts/replicate/run_replicate.py&#96; | &#96;requests.get(url, stream=True)&#96; for downloads |\\\\n| &#96;scripts/task/download.py&#96; | &#96;requests.get(url, stream=True)&#96; for video download |\\\\n| &#96;scripts/task/poll.py&#96; | Uses &#96;ViduClient&#96; for polling |\\\\n\\\\n### Libraries\\\\n\\\\n- Main HTTP library: &#96;requests&#96;\\\\n- No &#96;httpx&#96;, &#96;aiohttp&#96;, or &#96;axios&#96; used in Python code\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 6. 新增 &#96;feeling:&#96; 配置段\n- &#96;requirements.txt&#96; 无需新增依赖（已有 &#96;requests&#96;, &#96;python-dotenv&#96;, &#96;PyYAML&#96;）\n\n---\n\n## Phase 2：接入本地生成 + 结果回传（P1）\n\n### 2.1 改造 &#96;scripts/endframe/gen_tail.py&#96;\n\n现有脚本从本地文件系统读取首帧 + prompt + 资产。需改造为：\n- 新增 &#96;--source platform&#96; 参数，当 source=platform 时从 &#96;output/meta/{episode}/shots.json&#96; 读取数据\n- 复用现有的 yunwu API 调用逻辑，仅修改数据输入层\n- 保持 &#96;--source local&#96; 向后兼容\n\n### 2.2 改造 &#96;scripts/i2v/batch.py&#96;\n\n- 新增首尾帧模式：当 shot 目录下存在 &#96;end.png&#96; 时，&#96;images&#96; 参数传两张图\n- 新增 &#96;--source platform&#96; 参数，从同步后的本地数据读取\n- 适配平台的 prompt 格式（英文 prompt vs 中文描述）\n\n### 2.3 新增 &#96;scripts/feeling/push_results.py&#96;\n\n- 将本地生成的尾帧图、视频上传回平台\n- 调用 &#96;upload.py&#96; 上传文件到 COS\n- 调用 &#96;POST /api/rough-cut/episode/{episodeId}&#96; 回写粗剪时间线\n- 调用 &#96;POST /api/assets/media/batch-confirm&#96; 确认资产媒体\n\n### 2.4 新增 &#96;scripts/feeling/full_pipeline.py&#96;\n\n完整流水线一键脚本：\n1. 拉取平台分镜数据\n2. 批量生成尾帧\n3. 批量生成视频（首帧 i2v + 首尾帧 i2v）\n4. 结果回传平台\n\n---\n\n## Phase 3：本地前端（P2，可选）\n\n此阶段在 Phase 1 和 Phase 2 完成后再规划，主要涉及：\n- FastAPI 本地后台服务\n- React/Vue 前端分镜板视图、多候选视频对比、粗剪时间线\n- Docker Compose 一键部署\n\n本计划暂不展开 Phase 3 的详细设计。\n\n---\n\n## 关键设计决策\n\n- **HTTP 客户端模式**：沿用 &#96;ViduClient&#96; 的 &#96;requests.Session()&#96; 模式，保持代码风格一致\n- **目录结构兼容**：平台拉取的数据存入 &#96;output/&#96; 目录，与现有本地文件结构对齐，减少下游脚本改动\n- **数据中间层**：&#96;sync.py&#96; 将平台 API 响应转为本地标准化 JSON（&#96;shots.json&#96;），下游脚本只读本地文件，与平台 API 格式解耦\n- **Token 自动刷新**：在 &#96;_request&#96; 中拦截 401 响应，自动调用 &#96;refresh_token()&#96; 后重试，对上层透明\n- **向后兼容**：所有改造的脚本通过 &#96;--source&#96; 参数区分数据来源，默认 &#96;local&#96; 保持原有行为\n",
